ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "year_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the year */,
  "decade" TEXT /* Decade the year belongs to */,
  "century" TEXT /* Century the year belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "month_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the month */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter the month belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the month belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death */,
  "cause_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the cause of death */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause of death */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data was collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data was collected */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month the data was collected */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of death */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths recorded */,
  "join_code" TEXT /* Code used to join data from different tables */,
  "split_code" TEXT /* Code used to split data for analysis */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deceased */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the deceased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution in the population */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution in the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Level of pollution */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health intervention */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the health intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "funding" INTEGER /* Funding allocated to the intervention */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_perm_id FOREIGN KEY ("perm_id") REFERENCES permissions ("perm_id")
)
